attacking_style: Long-range, aggressive attacks from distance (40+ km out) designed to fracture existing breakaways rather than solo efforts from the peloton. Lacks sustained power to maintain efforts through to the finish.
team_tactics: Limited data on team support. Appears to operate independently within breakaway scenarios, relying on personal timing rather than coordinated team setup.
terrain_preference: Selective terrain that allows powerful accelerations to split groups but doesn't require sustained climbing or time trialing efforts. Avoids pure sprinter-friendly flat finishes.
vulnerability: Cannot sustain long-range attacks inside final 10km. Gets caught by organized chases when pace becomes consistently high. Lacks finishing speed against pure sprinters.
key_patterns: Attacks from within established breakaways rather than bridging from peloton (46km selection move)
Creates selections through acceleration but lacks engine to maintain advantage to finish line
Effective at distancing sprinter types temporarily but vulnerable to organized pursuit groups
form_trajectory: unknown: single observation shows aggressive racing but inability to convert efforts into results
